subject: english
title: Unit 8 Grammar 2 — Direct + Indirect Objects · Leo's Test App
subtitle: 12 tabs, Leo tests what he learned: flashcards + quiz, fill-in, mini-MCQ, detective, sentence builder, drag-sort, pattern rewrite, survey, editable word web, guess who (3 rounds), scored quiz, Dribble! soccer round.

content: Test what Leo learned about direct and indirect objects.
Rewrite sentences from Pattern A to Pattern B and vice versa.
Score the formative quiz with at least 80%.
language: Recall vocabulary: direct object, indirect object, accuracy.
Apply Pattern A (verb + D.O. + to/for + I.O.) and Pattern B (verb + I.O. + D.O.).
Distinguish verbs that use to (give, show, send, tell, write) from those that use for (buy, make).
